steps.title: Identify what 'specify contributions' demands
steps.content: The phrase “specify Percival Lowell's contributions” requires naming concrete actions—what Lowell actually did to advance the search, not just a general nod to his importance.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly accomplishes the goal by naming two specific contributions: Lowell started the search in 1905 and funded the observatory upgrade that enabled the discovery.

The other three either leave contributions unspecified (A), emphasize someone else's role (B), or contain a factual error (C).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
